name: @leether/md2wechat
description: Markdown to WeChat Official Account — compliant HTML rendering & draft publishing

scripts.check: find scripts harness -name '*.mjs' -print | sort | xargs -n1 node --check && node harness/test-code-generator-contract.mjs && node harness/test-preflight-fixtures.mjs && node harness/test-orchestrator-command-contract.mjs && node harness/test-relay-script-sync-contract.mjs && node harness/test-publish-evidence-contract.mjs && node harness/test-reconcile-wechat-drafts.mjs && node harness/test-self-report-no-write.mjs && node harness/run-generated-check-tests.mjs
